adj.description: Adjacency matrix: 1 if a is adjacent to a', 0 otherwise

r.description: Reward for being at location a at time t

cap.description: Capacity of location a at time t

assumptions.description: Every location is adjacent to itself.

code.python: assert all(adj[a][a] == 1 for a in range(nA))
assert all(cap[a][t] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

y.description: 1 if flight p is at location a at time t, 0 otherwise

z.description: 1 if flight p moves from a at time t to a' at time t+1, 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Each flight is at exactly one location at each time period.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a \in A} y_{p,a,t} = 1 \quad \forall p \in P, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[p, a, t] for a in range(nA)) == 1 for p in range(nP) for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: The number of flights at each location does not exceed the location capacity.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{p \in P} y_{p,a,t} \leq \text{cap}_{a,t} \quad \forall a \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[p, a, t] for p in range(nP)) <= cap[a][t] for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: Flow conservation: flights at location a at time t equal those at t-1 plus arrivals minus departures (one-step transitions).
constraints.formulation: y_{p,a,t} = y_{p,a,t-1} + \sum_{a' \in A} z_{p,a',a,t-1} - \sum_{a' \in A} z_{p,a,a',t-1} \quad \forall p \in P, a \in A, t \in T, t > 0

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[p, a, t] == y[p, a, t-1] + gp.quicksum(z[p, a2, a, t-1] for a2 in range(nA)) - gp.quicksum(z[p, a, a2, t-1] for a2 in range(nA)) for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for t in range(1, nT))

constraints.description: Movements are only allowed between adjacent locations.
constraints.formulation: z_{p,a,a',t} \leq \text{adj}_{a,a'} \quad \forall p \in P, a, a' \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(z[p, a, a2, t] <= adj[a][a2] for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: No movements out of the final time period (would arrive outside the horizon).
constraints.formulation: z_{p,a,a',nT-1} = 0 \quad \forall p \in P, a, a' \in A

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(z[p, a, a2, nT-1] == 0 for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA))

constraints.description: Movements at time t require the flight to be present at time t (depart only from where you are).
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a' \in A} z_{p,a,a',t} \leq y_{p,a,t} \quad \forall p \in P, a \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(z[p, a, a2, t] for a2 in range(nA)) <= y[p, a, t] for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

objective.description: Maximize total reward for all flights across all locations and time periods.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(r[a][t] * y[p, a, t] for p in range(nP) for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
